title: Smoking Pipe
description: Adds a magical pipe granting potion effects based on what flowers it's packed with.
body:
![Smoking Pipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bd7124d474f55e98ecd470a7fc3b9725f2ac44d.png)
This mod adds a wooden pipe you can pack with any small flower, granting potion effects like suspicious stew.
- Each flower can be packed by putting it next to your pipe in any crafting GUI.
- There is a 20% chance that a cloud shaped like a ship will spawn when using the pipe.
- The pipe may be smoked 5 times in succession before it must be repacked

![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed1a12a53bf704554bd515a6246b3b377867419d.png)

_This mod was (unfortunately) made in MCreator. I'm fairly certain it shouldn't cause issues, but always take MCreator projects with a grain of salt._
